title: murucuia herbertiana
side_effects: Murucuia herbertiana can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extracts may lead to headaches, fatigue, and skin irritation. In rare cases, excessive exposure to the plant's toxins can cause respiratory problems, such as bronchitis or asthma attacks. If not handled correctly, the plant's sap can also cause skin burns and blisters.
